data.title: Eiffage’s Smulders Boosts Role in Renewable Energy
data.description:
Eiffage (FR:FGR) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Smulders, a subsidiary of Eiffage, has secured contracts worth over 1 billion euros in 2024, including a key project to construct jacket foundations for offshore wind farms in Normandy. This project, set to commence in 2026, underscores Smulders’ leadership in the renewable energy sector and supports France’s energy transition goals.

data.description:

An update from Siemens Energy ( (DE:ENR) ) is now available.

Siemens Energy AG has released a notification regarding changes in voting rights, specifically involving BlackRock, Inc. The announcement indicates an increase in voting rights from 5.06% to 5.23%. This adjustment reflects an acquisition or disposal of shares with voting rights and demonstrates BlackRock’s significant stake in Siemens Energy, influencing shareholder dynamics and potential strategic decisions within the company.

More about Siemens Energy

Siemens Energy AG is a leading company in the energy industry, based in Munich, Germany, specializing in the provision of energy solutions encompassing the generation, transmission, and efficient use of energy.

data.title: Saker Aviation Services Announces Leadership Change
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Saker Aviation Services ( (SKAS) ) has provided an announcement.

Saker Aviation Services announced that Samuel Goldstein has departed from his roles as President, CEO, Treasurer, Secretary, and Director of the Company effective December 6, 2024. He is succeeded by William Wachtel, who has been involved with the company’s board since 2005 and is a managing partner at Wachtel Missry LLP. This leadership change is not linked to any disputes regarding company operations or policies. Wachtel’s appointment is expected to maintain stability within the company’s leadership due to his extensive experience and previous associations with the board.

data.title: DCI Advisors Receives EGM Requisition from Major Shareholder
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Dolphin Capital Investors ( (GB:DCI) ) just unveiled an announcement.

DCI Advisors Ltd, a company listed on the AIM market, has received a requisition notice from Almitas Capital LLC, which holds approximately 19.95% of the company’s voting rights. The notice seeks to call an extraordinary general meeting (EGM) pursuant to the company’s articles of association. The directors have confirmed the validity of the requisition and will issue a meeting notice shortly. Shareholders are advised to take no action until the notice is released.

An update from Redde Northgate ( (GB:ZIG) ) is now available.

ZIGUP plc announced the grant of nil cost options over its ordinary shares under its Long-Term Incentive Plan to Matthew David Barton, who serves as the General Counsel & Company Secretary. These options, which total 83,555 shares, are set to become exercisable following a three-year performance period, contingent on performance conditions and continued service.
